tasks.label: Bump Major Version
tasks.command: CURRENT=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && NEW=$(semver -i major $CURRENT) && npm version $NEW --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='./.claude-plugin/plugin.json';const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p));d.version='$NEW';fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(d,null,2)+'\n')" && echo "Version bumped from $CURRENT to $NEW (updated package.json and plugin.json)"

tasks.label: Bump Minor Version
tasks.command: CURRENT=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && NEW=$(semver -i minor $CURRENT) && npm version $NEW --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='./.claude-plugin/plugin.json';const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p));d.version='$NEW';fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(d,null,2)+'\n')" && echo "Version bumped from $CURRENT to $NEW (updated package.json and plugin.json)"

tasks.label: Bump Patch Version
tasks.command: CURRENT=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && NEW=$(semver -i patch $CURRENT) && npm version $NEW --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='./.claude-plugin/plugin.json';const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p));d.version='$NEW';fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(d,null,2)+'\n')" && echo "Version bumped from $CURRENT to $NEW (updated package.json and plugin.json)"
